prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.9 kg; Height 172.1 cm; BMI 19.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 121/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 192mg/dL; 6 months ago 196mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 196mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.2kg; 9 months ago 57.1kg; 6 months ago 56.3kg; 3 months ago 56.3kg; current 56.9kg), Height (12 months ago 172.1cm; 9 months ago 172.1cm; 6 months ago 172.1cm; 3 months ago 172.1cm; current 172.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 121mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 121mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 5.3mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 4.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 518mg/g; 9 months ago 781mg/g; 6 months ago 645mg/g; 3 months ago 897mg/g; current 857mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 138mg/dL; 6 months ago 135mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 13.4g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.48 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
